summary: Archive game playback from the Today's Lineup carousel
description:
GIVEN a user who is entitled for Archive game playback is logged in

AND the user is on the Home page

AND an Archive game is present in the Today’s Lineup carousel

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects an archive game from the Today’s Lineup carousel

AND selects a team feed for playback
steps.result:
THEN the Home page is dismissed

AND the video player displays full screen

AND playback starts successfully
